title: Three-dimensional structure of dendritic spines and synapses in rat hippocampus at postnatal day 15 and adult ages
abstract: Using serial section EM and 3D reconstruction, we characterize the developmental changes in dendritic spine structure and synapse morphology in rat hippocampal CA1, establishing the thin/mushroom/stubby spine classification.
notes: Established the canonical spine classification still used in connectomics.
